title: Mod Menu for Neoforge
body:
> use [Better ModList](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-modlist) instead, its much better than my version

this is a port of Mod Menu for the Neoforge mod loader, as I believe Neoforge is in need of a better-looking mod menu than the one that is currently provided.

![Example Mod Menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4077ffbebed7742d4a1e51ad0338ab53f4cb3dce_0.webp)

requires [Text Placeholder API (Neoforge edition))](https://modrinth.com/mod/tpan?version=26.1.1), but since it's Neoforge I couldn't bundle them together, so you'll have to download that as well.

original mod was [here](https://modrinth.com/mod/mod-menu-(neoforge-edition)), but I needed this as a dependency for one of my project which I am porting to Neoforge which is why this whole mess of ports was made in the first place. 

additionally, the little widget that appears when you hover over a mods config is gone, i'll look to fix that. however, this version also automatically detects if a mod has a config, and if so, it will be accessible - no need to rely on this mod for its apis, it will automatically use your config if the user has the mod installed.
